cat.description: Unlike asteroids these do not burn out, but intensify permanently as constellations, dayglo beacons--seen first by the scout, a lone warrior two-steps ahead, oft fell by one pandemic in order to forewarn of the next--the function of phoenix, yet shape of the HUMMINGBIRD.

nodes.title: Which touch do we feel when we can no longer touch?
What would you do tomorrow if it was the last day of your life (VIHda)?
